displayTitle: Tales of Kenobi (Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions)
synopsis:
A single-volume collection pairing two Expanded Universe novels centered on Obi-Wan Kenobi.

*Kenobi*, by John Jackson Miller, follows the Jedi Master in the aftermath of the Clone Wars as he settles on the desert world of Tatooine to secretly watch over the infant Luke Skywalker. Known to locals only as "Ben," the quiet offworlder tries to keep to himself, but when violence flares between moisture farmers and a tribe of marauding Tusken Raiders, he is drawn into the conflict, risking exposure as the hero of the Clone Wars and endangering his true mission as guardian of the galaxy's last hope.

*The Approaching Storm*, by Alan Dean Foster, is set before the Clone Wars, as discontent threatens to fracture the Republic. At Chancellor Palpatine's request, the Jedi Council dispatches Obi-Wan Kenobi and Luminara Unduli, along with their Padawans Anakin Skywalker and Barriss Offee, to quell a secessionist movement on the planet Ansion. To succeed they must complete near-impossible tasks while being stalked by an enemy determined to see the negotiations, and the mission, fail.
title: Tales of Kenobi (Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions)
